title: Bearer auth — protected endpoint
description: Demonstrates a minimal authentication check on a protected endpoint. The /profile call inspects the Authorization header (case-insensitive lookup) and returns 401 if missing or 403 if the token doesn't match the expected one. Use as a starting point when you need to mock an authenticated API.

calls.description: Returns the current user's profile. Requires Authorization: Bearer <token> matching db.token.
Mock login: returns the token from db. Body: { email: string, password: string } (any non-empty values accepted).
calls.response:
if (!data?.email || !data?.password) throwError('email and password are required', 400);
return { accessToken: db.token, tokenType: 'Bearer', expiresIn: 3600, profile: db.profile };
